---
pagetitle: "Feature Engineering A-Z | Condensed Nearest Neighbor"
image: social-cards/imbalenced-cnn.png
---

# 🏗️ Condensed Nearest Neighbor {#sec-imbalenced-cnn}

::: {style="visibility: hidden; height: 0px;"}
## Condensed Nearest Neighbor
:::

WIP

## Pros and Cons

### Pros

### Cons

## R Examples

## Python Examples
